name: Colored Glass Bath Canister Pink - Threshold™
description:
Find a convenient spot to keep your cotton balls and other bathroom essentials organized with the Colored Glass Bath Canister from Threshold™. This pink bath canister features a jar-like shape with a removable lid to help keep the contents neatly covered. Made of colored glass, it makes a practical addition to your bath space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
